text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #1)

I just click on Search Tab and I have to get something like this: https://duckduckgo.com/?q=qbittorrent+search+plugin&iax=images&ia=images&iai=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.ghacks.net%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2016%2F01%2Fqbittorrent-search.jpg

and with newer qbittorrent clients the list it's not there, also new plugins are not possible to install.
